property.name: java.library.path
property.value: C:\app\jdk-17\bin;C:\WINDOWS\Sun\Java\bin;C:\WINDOWS\system32;C:\WINDOWS;C:\app\jdk-17\bin;C:\Python312\Scripts\;C:\Python312\;C:\Windows\system32;C:\Windows;C:\Windows\System32\Wbem;C:\Windows\System32\WindowsPowerShell\v1.0\;C:\Windows\System32\OpenSSH\;C:\Program Files (x86)\NVIDIA Corporation\PhysX\Common;C:\Program Files\NVIDIA Corporation\NVIDIA NvDLISR;C:\ProgramData\chocolatey\bin;C:\Program Files\Meld\;C:\Program Files\nodejs\;C:\Program Files\Amazon\AWSCLIV2\;C:\Program Files\dotnet\;C:\app\far;C:\Program Files (x86)\Gpg4win\..\GnuPG\bin;C:\app\apache-tomcat-9;C:\WINDOWS\system32;C:\WINDOWS;C:\WINDOWS\System32\Wbem;C:\WINDOWS\System32\WindowsPowerShell\v1.0\;C:\WINDOWS\System32\OpenSSH\;C:\app\apache-maven-3.8.8\bin;C:\Program Files\RedHat\Podman\;C:\Program Files\Docker\Docker\resources\bin;C:\app\gradle-8.13\bin;C:\app\sbt\bin;C:\Program Files\Git\cmd;C:\Program Files\Git\mingw64\bin;C:\Program Files\Git\usr\bin;C:\Program Files\Amazon\AWSSAMCLI\bin\;C:\Program Files\Amazon\AWSSAMCLI\bin;C:\app\flyway\;C:\app\ffmpeg-2025-09-18\bin;C:\Users\madsu\AppData\Local\Microsoft\WindowsApps;C:\Users\madsu\AppData\Local\Programs\Microsoft VS Code\bin;C:\Program Files\JetBrains\IntelliJ IDEA Community Edition 2024.1.1\bin;C:\Users\madsu\AppData\Roaming\npm;C:\Program Files\JetBrains\PyCharm Community Edition 2024.2.3\bin;C:\Users\madsu\AppData\Local\JetBrains\Toolbox\scripts;C:\Users\madsu\AppData\Local\Microsoft\WindowsApps;C:\Users\madsu\AppData\Local\Programs\Windsurf\bin;C:\Program Files\JetBrains\IntelliJ IDEA Community Edition 2024.3.2.2\bin;;C:\tools\mysql\current\bin;C:\app\cmd;C:\Users\madsu\AppData\Local\PowerToys\DSCModules\;C:\Users\madsu\AppData\Local\Programs\Ollama;.

testcase.name: testGatewayAuthFailure

CamelSpringBootExecutionListener now ready to start CamelContext 2026-03-22T22:20:09.065+01:00 INFO 27656 --- [api-gateway] [ main] o.a.c.t.s.j.CamelAnnotationsHandler : Skipping starting CamelContext(s) as UseAdviceWith annotation was found and isUseAdviceWith is set to true. 2026-03-22T22:20:09.657+01:00 INFO 27656 --- [api-gateway] [ main] org.apache.camel.builder.AdviceWith : AdviceWith route after: Route(gateway-forwarder)[From[direct:forward-to-integration] -> [OnException[[java.lang.Exception] -> [SetHeader[CamelHttpResponseCode, 500], SetBody[CrossBorderResponse(requestId=null, status=FAILURE, message=Internal Server Error in Gateway, processedBy=null, data=null)]]], OnException[[java.lang.SecurityException] -> [SetHeader[CamelHttpResponseCode, 401], SetBody[CrossBorderResponse(requestId=null, status=FAILURE, message=Unauthorized: Missing or invalid token, processedBy=null, data=null)]]], OnException[[org.apache.camel.processor.ThrottlerRejectedExecutionException] -> [SetHeader[CamelHttpResponseCode, 429], SetBody[CrossBorderResponse(requestId=null, status=FAILURE, message=Too Many Requests: Rate limit exceeded, processedBy=null, data=null)]]], Log[Forwarding request ${body.requestId} to Integration Service], To[http://localhost:8081/integration/v1/process?bridgeEndpoint=true]]] 2026-03-22T22:20:09.662+01:00 INFO 27656 --- [api-gateway] [ main] org.apache.camel.builder.AdviceWith : Adviced route before/after as XML: <route xmlns="http://camel.apache.org/schema/spring" id="gateway-forwarder"> <from uri="direct:forward-to-integration"/> <onException> <exception>java.lang.Exception</exception> <setHeader name="CamelHttpResponseCode"> <expressionDefinition/> </setHeader> <setBody> <expressionDefinition/> </setBody> </onException> <onException> <exception>java.lang.SecurityException</exception> <setHeader name="CamelHttpResponseCode"> <expressionDefinition/> </setHeader> <setBody> <expressionDefinition/> </setBody> </onException> <onException> <exception>org.apache.camel.processor.ThrottlerRejectedExecutionException</exception> <setHeader name="CamelHttpResponseCode"> <expressionDefinition/> </setHeader> <setBody> <expressionDefinition/> </setBody> </onException> <log message="Forwarding request ${body.requestId} to Integration Service"/> <to uri="http://localhost:8081/integration/v1/process?bridgeEndpoint=true"/> </route>
<route xmlns="http://camel.apache.org/schema/spring" id="gateway-forwarder"> <from uri="direct:forward-to-integration"/> <onException> <exception>java.lang.Exception</exception> <setHeader name="CamelHttpResponseCode"> <expressionDefinition/> </setHeader> <setBody> <expressionDefinition/> </setBody> </onException> <onException> <exception>java.lang.SecurityException</exception> <setHeader name="CamelHttpResponseCode"> <expressionDefinition/> </setHeader> <setBody> <expressionDefinition/> </setBody> </onException> <onException> <exception>org.apache.camel.processor.ThrottlerRejectedExecutionException</exception> <setHeader name="CamelHttpResponseCode"> <expressionDefinition/> </setHeader> <setBody> <expressionDefinition/> </setBody> </onException> <log message="Forwarding request ${body.requestId} to Integration Service"/> <to uri="http://localhost:8081/integration/v1/process?bridgeEndpoint=true"/> </route>
